name: tree-sitter-moo
description: Tree-sitter grammar for ToastStunt/LambdaMOO verb code.

scripts.build:wasm: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('dist', { recursive: true })" && tree-sitter build --wasm -o dist/tree-sitter-moo.wasm
scripts.test: env HOME=/tmp TREE_SITTER_DIR=/tmp tree-sitter test --config-path tree-sitter-config.json
scripts.validate:fixtures: env HOME=/tmp TREE_SITTER_DIR=/tmp node scripts/validate-fixtures.js fixtures/valid
scripts.validate:wasm: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const wasm = fs.readFileSync('dist/tree-sitter-moo.wasm'); if (!WebAssembly.validate(wasm)) throw new Error('dist/tree-sitter-moo.wasm failed WebAssembly.validate');"
scripts.ci: npm run generate && npm test && npm run validate:fixtures && npm run build:wasm && npm run validate:wasm
scripts.prepare:package: npm run generate && npm run build:wasm

author: SindomeCorp <slither@sindome.com>
